dateline: Hawthorne, CA / Boca Chica, TX — May 2002–Present
heroHeadline: Booster 19 All 33 Raptor 3 Engines Installed — IFT-12 Static Fire Imminent; B1103 Debut Success
heroSubtitle: 8,740 days of reusability milestones — 42 launches in 2026 (595 total recoveries); Booster 19 full engine install complete, 33-engine static fire expected within days; IFT-12 targets May 2026 as SpaceX IPO process advances toward June Nasdaq listing
footerNote: Data sourced from SpaceX.com, FAA, NASA, SpaceNews, NASASpaceflight.com, Spaceflight Now, CNBC, Bloomberg, TechCrunch, TIME, Space.com, Via Satellite
